summary: Completed testing of Olivo Cards password reset, image upload URL fix, and PayPal subscription features. Backend: 14/15 tests passed (1 test fixture issue). Frontend: All features working correctly.
passed_tests: API root endpoint accessible
POST /api/auth/request-password-reset endpoint works (returns success message)
POST /api/auth/request-password-reset with admin email works
POST /api/auth/reset-password endpoint exists (returns 404 for non-existent user)
Password validation - rejects passwords < 6 characters
Password reset flow works - reset, login with new password, restore original
Image upload returns correct URL with domain olivo-cards-preview.preview.emergentagent.com
Plans endpoint returns data with required fields
Profesional plan has 15 days trial period
PayPal client ID endpoint returns mode and has_secret fields
Admin PayPal settings endpoint works
PayPal subscription creation returns approval URL
VCards endpoint requires authentication
Login page shows '¿Olvidaste tu contraseña?' link
Reset password page loads at /reset-password with email input and submit button
Reset password step 2 shows new password and confirm password fields
Subscription page shows all 3 plans correctly
Profesional plan has '🎁 15 días gratis' badge
Profesional plan has 'Probar 15 días gratis' button
Checkout section shows trial notice with pricing info
Checkout shows 'Pago recurrente' notice
PayPal subscribe button shows 'Iniciar prueba gratis de 15 días'
VCard form has 'Subir imagen' button
VCard form has hidden file input for image upload
VCard form has photo URL input field

success_rate.backend: 93% (14/15 tests passed - 1 test fixture ordering issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All correcciones verified: 1) Password reset via /reset-password page working, 2) Image upload returns correct URL with olivo-cards-preview.preview.emergentagent.com domain, 3) PayPal is configured (has_secret: true) and subscription creation returns approval_url. Plans: Básico=$2.99, Profesional=$9.99 with 15 days trial, Empresarial=$29.99.

image_upload.ui_element: Subir imagen button in VCard form

paypal_subscription.trial_display: 15 días de prueba gratis notice in checkout
